title: LE PERFORMANCE ++
description:
A must-have pack filled with everything you need + more
        
to start playing Minecraft smoothly on even the worst of devices.
body:
**A must-have pack filled with everything you need to start playing Minecraft smoothly on even the worst of devices.**

- This pack also includes new features that enhance your game such as: "Do A Barrel Roll", Fence jumping, **and MORE!!!!**

**Only want the performance?**

Not to worry! Simply just disable the mods you don't want and game away!
